calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Cory Narog, Appellant/Cross Defendant/Plaintiff, present.
David J. Yang, Esq., Respondant/Cross Complainant/Defendant, also present.

The court receives the Declaration of Yvette Narog, co-Appellant/Cross Defendant/Plaintiff, not present due to hospitalization.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant/Cross Defendant/Plaintiff Cory Narog testifies on his own behalf.

Respondant/Cross Complainant/Defendant David J. Yang, Esq. testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

VJ Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: Vicki Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 303)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-03-13 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 303
